Interface SpecExtractor

All Known Implementing Classes:
JMLSpecExtractor
public interface SpecExtractor
Extracts specifications from comments.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Contract
    createDefaultContract(IProgramMethod pm, boolean useSoundDefault)
     
    ImmutableSet<BlockContract>
    extractBlockContracts(IProgramMethod method, LabeledStatement labeled)
    Returns the block contracts for the passed labeled statement if it labels a block.
    ImmutableSet<BlockContract>
    extractBlockContracts(IProgramMethod method, StatementBlock block)
    Returns the block contracts for the passed block.
    ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement>
    extractClassSpecs(KeYJavaType kjt)
    Returns the class invariants for the passed type.
    ImmutableSet<LoopContract>
    extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, LabeledStatement labeled)
    Returns the loop contracts for the passed labeled statement if it labels a block.
    ImmutableSet<LoopContract>
    extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, LoopStatement loop)
    Returns the loop contracts for the passed loop.
    ImmutableSet<LoopContract>
    extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, StatementBlock block)
    Returns the loop contracts for the passed block.
    LoopSpecification
    extractLoopInvariant(IProgramMethod pm, LoopStatement loop)
    Returns the loop invariant for the passed loop (if any).
    ImmutableSet<MergeContract>
    extractMergeContracts(IProgramMethod method, MergePointStatement mps, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> methodParams)
    Returns the MergeContracts for the given MergePointStatement.
    ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement>
    extractMethodSpecs(IProgramMethod pm)
    Returns the operation contracts for the passed operation.
    ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement>
    extractMethodSpecs(IProgramMethod pm, boolean addInvariant)
     
    ImmutableList<PositionedString>
    getWarnings()
    Returns all warnings generated so far in the translation process.

  • Method Details

    • extractMethodSpecs

      ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> extractMethodSpecs(IProgramMethod pm) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the operation contracts for the passed operation.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • extractClassSpecs

      ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> extractClassSpecs(KeYJavaType kjt) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the class invariants for the passed type.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • extractLoopInvariant

      LoopSpecification extractLoopInvariant(IProgramMethod pm, LoopStatement loop) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the loop invariant for the passed loop (if any).
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • extractBlockContracts

      ImmutableSet<BlockContract> extractBlockContracts(IProgramMethod method, StatementBlock block) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the block contracts for the passed block.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method
      block - the statement block
      Returns:
      the block contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • extractLoopContracts

      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, StatementBlock block) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the loop contracts for the passed block.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method containing the block.
      block - the block.
      Returns:
      the loop contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • extractLoopContracts

      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, LoopStatement loop) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the loop contracts for the passed loop.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method containing the loop.
      loop - the loop.
      Returns:
      the loop contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • extractBlockContracts

      ImmutableSet<BlockContract> extractBlockContracts(IProgramMethod method, LabeledStatement labeled) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the block contracts for the passed labeled statement if it labels a block.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method
      labeled - the labeled statement
      Returns:
      the block contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • extractLoopContracts

      ImmutableSet<LoopContract> extractLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, LabeledStatement labeled) throws SLTranslationException
      Returns the loop contracts for the passed labeled statement if it labels a block.
      Parameters:
      method - the program method
      labeled - the labeled statement
      Returns:
      the loop contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • getWarnings

      ImmutableList<PositionedString> getWarnings()
      Returns all warnings generated so far in the translation process. (e.g. this may warn about unsupported features which have been ignored by the translation)
